data.title: Banco Comercial Português, SA releases interim report on share buy-back program transactions.
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, SA has released an interim report detailing the transactions carried out within the Share Buy-Back Programme. The report provides an overview of the purchases made by the bank during the specified period. The total number of shares bought back by Banco Comercial Português, SA is disclosed, along with the corresponding financial figures. This update aims to ensure transparency and inform stakeholders about the progress of the Share Buy-Back Programme.

data.title: Taiwan prepaid card market grows at 6.1%, set to hit $12.21B by 2025. Digital wallet market to reach $14.94B by 2029.
data.description: A report titled "Taiwan Prepaid Card and Digital Wallet Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook - Q2 2025 Update" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The prepaid card and digital wallet market in Taiwan is showing significant growth, with an expected annual growth rate of 6.1%. By 2025, the market is projected to reach approximately US$12.21 billion. Between 2020 and 2024, the sector saw a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.8%. Moving forward, it is estimated to continue expanding at a CAGR of 5.2%.

data.title: Global Traffic Management market grew at 10.35% CAGR (2021-2024), valued at $38.46B in 2024, expected to reach $83.05B by 2031. Cloud-based and Intelligent Transportation Systems driving efficiency and sustainability.
data.description: A report on the Traffic Management Market has been recently published, offering insights and forecasts for the period 2021-2031. Between 2021 and 2024, the market experienced a growth rate of 10.35% annually, reaching a value of USD 38.46 Billion in 2024. Projections indicate that by 2031, the market is anticipated to reach USD 83.05 Billion. The report covers analysis of system types, deployment modes, and applications, providing a comprehensive overview of the market's historical performance.

data.title: Public survey shows significant differences between public budget preferences versus Congress' passed budget.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, in College Park, Maryland, the One Big Beautiful Bill (OBBB) was officially signed into law. This initiative brings significant alterations to government spending and tax policies. A recent survey revealed that the general population has distinct views on budget priorities. Overwhelming percentages of both Republicans and Democrats expressed a preference for a drastically revised budget. This demonstrates a shared desire for transformative changes in fiscal strategy following the OBBB's implementation. The survey highlights the vast divergence between public opinion and the current budgetary framework.

data.title: Bitcoin's value increased by 286% in 2021, then declined 42% in 2022. It recovered by 52% in 2023, surging to nearly $57,000 by 2024.
data.description: This year, the United States celebrates its 249th anniversary on the Fourth of July. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), known for its principles of financial independence, has experienced notable changes in recent years around this holiday. In the period between 2020 and 2021, the value of Bitcoin surged by an impressive 286%. However, the bear market of 2022 led to a sharp 42% decline in its price. Following this, Bitcoin started a steady upward trend, rebounding by 52% in 2023 and reaching nearly $57,000 by the last Independence Day.
